instructions.objective: Implement HTTP/2 server support using monoio-http crate. Support multiplexed streams, flow control, and graceful degradation.
instructions.constraints: - Use monoio-http crate (ByteDance's official HTTP lib for monoio) - Feature flag: http2 = ["dep:monoio-http"] - Support ALPN negotiation - Pass h2spec compliance tests - Maintain HTTP/1.1 as default

context.tree: harrow-server-monoio/ ├── Cargo.toml ├── src/ │ ├── lib.rs │ ├── connection.rs │ └── codec.rs └── tests/ └── integration.rs

guidance.role: Senior Rust engineer with HTTP/2 experience
guidance.notes: Research monoio-http API first. Key areas: 1. Server builder with HTTP/1.1 + HTTP/2 support 2. ALPN negotiation in TLS (if TLS support exists) 3. Stream handling for multiplexing 4. Integration with existing harrow_core::dispatch
